km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Stanhope於1142年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Stanhope42歲，母親Matilda d’Aubigny22歲。他和Emma de Longvillers至少有1個兒子。他去世於1210年享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Stanhope于1142年出生在英国时，他的父亲Thomas Stanhope42岁，母亲Matilda d’Aubigny22岁。他和Emma de Longvillers至少有1个儿子。他去世于1210年享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Stanhope was born in 1142, in England, his father, Thomas Stanhope, was 42 and his mother, Matilda d’Aubigny, was 22. He had at least 1 son with Emma de Longvillers. He died in 1210, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Stanhope est né en 1142, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Stanhope, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Matilda d’Aubigny, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Emma de Longvillers. Il est décédé en 1210, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Stanhope 1142 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Stanhope 42 und seine Mutter Matilda d’Aubigny 22. Er hatte mit Emma de Longvillers mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stanhope è nato il nel 1142 nel England, il suo padre, Thomas Stanhope, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Matilda d’Aubigny, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Emma de Longvillers. Morì nel 1210, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Stanhopeが1142年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Stanhopeは42歳，母Matilda d’Aubignyは22歳であった。彼はEmma de Longvillersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1210年に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Stanhope(이)가 1142년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Stanhope(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda d’Aubigny(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Emma de Longvillers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1210년 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stanhope nasceu em 1142, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Stanhope, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Matilda d’Aubigny, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Emma de Longvillers. Ele faleceu em 1210, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Stanhope родился в 1142 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Stanhope было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda d’Aubigny, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Emma de Longvillers. Он умер в 1210 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Stanhope nació en 1142, en Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Stanhope, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Matilda d’Aubigny, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Emma de Longvillers. Murió en 1210, a la edad de 68 años.
